author: himanshudongre
name: Order-9 N-gram Backoff + Score-First LoRA TTT + LeakyReLU(0.9)² + GPTQ-Int5
blurb: 11L 512d GQA 8/4, MLP 3.0x, XSA-4, LeakyReLU(0.9)², BigramHash(4096), SmearGate, U-Net skips, GPTQ int5. Score-first LoRA TTT (AdamW, rank-8). Order-9 chunk-based N-gram eval cache with entropy-adaptive alpha and per-order multipliers. Mean of 3 seeds: val_bpb 0.29509 (std 0.00014). Training 525s on 8xH100 SXM, eval ~430s.
